compiled_state.title: Document v3 ticket command mock pattern for test stubs
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Gap analysis finding (implicit_assumption): T2 and T3 replace FAKE_TK stubs with v3 ticket command mocks, but no task specifies the canonical mock pattern. Without a reference, each test file may implement an incompatible mock interface. Create tests/lib/fake-ticket.sh: a reusable v3 ticket command stub that: (1) accepts ticket subcommands (create, show, list, comment), (2) logs calls to TICKET_LOG_FILE env var, (3) returns minimal valid JSON output for show/list, (4) exits 0. T2 and T3 then source or invoke this shared stub rather than defining their own.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
